Insert the straw, fill with water, remove the straw, and tie the balloon. Are these balloons safe for children to use? Yes, they are safe with adult supervision and easy to use. Can the balloons be reused after use? No, they are designed for single use and burst on impact. What occasions are these water balloons suitable for? Ideal for birthdays, parties, school games, and outdoor fun. Do the balloons come pre-attached to the straws? Yes, each balloon comes with a straw for quick and easy filling.
